test	Run npm test	> hello-world@1.0.0 test
test	Run npm test	> jest
test	Run npm test

test	Run npm test	  Expected: 1
test	Run npm test	  Received: 2
test	Run npm test	::error file=src/foo.ts,line=42::Expected 1, got 2
test	Run npm test	Tests: 1 failed, 0 passed
test	Run npm test	::error::Process completed with exit code 1.
